programme.desc: Voight and the team race to solve the Bell case to prevent further deaths.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Hosted by Daytime Emmy Award® winning host Steve Harvey, Family Feud brings all new hilarious moments and families as they compete for a chance to win up to $20,000 by guessing the most popular answers to questions posed to 100 people surveyed.

programme.title: The Revenant
programme.desc: Hugh Glass is attacked by a bear and left for dead while on a hunting expedition. Despite unimaginable grief and betrayal by his confidant, he must navigate a vicious winter in a relentless pursuit to live.

programme.title: Matlock S2
programme.desc: Follow Madeline Matlock as she rejoins the work force at a prestigious law firm, where she uses her wily tactics to win cases and expose wrongdoing.

programme.title: Gran Turismo: Based On A True Story
programme.desc: The true story of a team of unlikely underdogs -- a working-class gamer, a former race-car driver, and an idealistic motorsport executive -- who risk it all to take on the most elite sport in the world.

programme.title: Ghosts S5

programme.title: The Guest
programme.desc: Fran presents Ria with a promising career opportunity, but concerning discoveries raise questions about her true intentions.

programme.title: Top Chef S23
programme.desc: Top Chef is a hit reality competition series that celebrates the culinary arts with a fascinating window into the competitive, pressurized environment of world-class cookery and the restaurant business at the highest level.

programme.title: Sheriff Country S1
programme.desc: Mickey Fox, a sheriff in Edgewater and stepsister of Cal Fire’s division chief Sharon Leone, must balance the demands of law enforcement with the complexities of motherhood, politics and a past that won’t stay buried.

programme.title: The National Dog Show ('20)
programme.desc: From the Kennel Club of Philadelphia, this cherished competition for all dog lovers returns for the 17th year. Hosted by John O'Hurley, the event features 2,000 of the nation's leading canines, including the world’s largest, smallest and most exotic. Over 170 breeds strut their stuff with the hope of becoming this year's top dog. “The Dean” David Frei provides expert show commentary, and Mary Carillo chimes in as an adept sideline reporter for this ultimate canine showdown. But which dog will have their day, and which will leave with their tail between their legs? After all, there can only be one “Best in Show”.

programme.title: We Bare Bears: The Movie
programme.desc: When the bears' love of food trucks and viral videos gets out of hand, the menacing Agent Trout from the National Wildlife Control pledges to restore the 'natural order' by separating them forever.

programme.title: Rango

programme.title: Top Chef S16
programme.desc: Kentucky based Top Chef alum Ed Lee drops by for a Quickfire that’s part trivia, part culinary creativity. Then, the Chefs head to Rupp Arena where legendary basketball Coach John Calipari and the UK Wildcats host a concession stand cook-off. Food & Wine Editor-in-Chief Hunter Lewis gets a courtside seat as he joins the judges to see which chef will take center court and who will get dunked.

programme.title: Top Chef S16
programme.desc: Top Chef can't go to Kentucky without taking a turn at fried chicken. Chef Art Smith guests judges a secret herbs and spices blind taste test ahead of the Quickfire fry-off. After the finger licking goodness, the Chefs turn their attention to another Kentucky legend, the Louisville Lip, boxer and philanthropist Muhammad Ali. Using his memorable fights as inspiration, the Chefs must make a progressive meal for a charity benefit at the Muhammad Ali Center for donors, the judges, and special guest Laila Ali.

programme.title: Top Chef S16
programme.desc: All season the chefs have been growing gardens at their Kentucky estate. Tom ambushes the sleeping chefs and challenges them to reap what they sowed and make a dish focused on their garden harvest. Then, for the last elimination challenge in Kentucky, the chefs head to Keeneland, a thoroughbred horse auction house, to bid on luxury ingredients for dishes to show gratitude to their culinary mentors. Chefs Bryan Voltaggio, Gavin Kaysen, JD Fratzke, Kim Alter, David Posey and Chris Coombs join the judges to see how far the Chefs have come and who deserves to go to Macau for the finals.

programme.desc: Pat-Pat is packing for a sleepover at the Palace when her suitcase goes missing. Noddy follows the clues and discovers that the Pockets took the suitcase in order to get Pat-Pat's sleepy pillow. They wanted to keep the pillow because it reminds them of Pat-Pat and they would miss her while she was at the sleepover. Noddy finds the Pockets and the suitcase in the dark, just in time for the sleepover. Queen Sparklewings invites everyone to the sleepover. Well done Noddy!

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: The Naughticorns are having a party and naturally they want everyone to come. Trouble is, so are the Pirates. But when no one turns up to either party, Noddy investigates: Why has no one come to either party?

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: George and Harold create a comic book about their gym teacher, but after a freak accident turns fantasy into reality, the best friends must run from his revenge

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: When George and Harold go back in time to stop the invention of homework, they realize they also eliminated the most important thing in the world: comic books

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: When Erica makes fun of George and Harold’s latest and greatest comic, they make a comic about her becoming a vampire

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: George and Harold transform their new Spanish teacher into a superhero after they feel guilty for pranking him, but their teacher loves it and gets carried away

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: After Erica convinces them that being suspended is a great vacation, George and Harold pull off every prank they can think of in order to get suspended

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It's time for a safari adventure in the dollhouse! Carlita, decked out like a safari truck, takes Gabby and Pandy on an adventure through the dollhouse as they follow clues to find the mysterious Felis Catus and discover all kinds of other dollhouse wildlife along the way! For the COTD segment, Cakey and Parrot show us how to make adorable safari snacks.

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: The Dinotrux find a nest of Tortool eggs. The hatchlings think Dozer is their mother and proceed to wreak havoc, painting everything in sight.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Riding Academy
programme.desc: Big Oil is bringing big improvements to the school. But new track stables, an upgraded veterinary lab and dorm rooms come at a cost — and spark disaster.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: After injecting all the teachers with bee DNA, the Melvins run the new "hivemind" of the school. But Ms. Ribble is accidently injected with too much "Bee- NA" and becomes the queen bee, overpowering the Melvins' control. George, Harold and the recently re-hired Vice Principal Krupp must work with the Melvins and stop her from turning everyone into her Zombees.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: In hopes of raising their grades so they can go to Lake Summer Camp, George and Harold must teach Ratrick, their assigned rat, a simple task. But Ratrick runs away into the sewers where he is doused with toxic waste and transformed into Poopacabra! It's now up to the boys and Captain Underpants to stop the beast before it takes over Piqua with its stench, and more importantly, ruins the boys' chances to go to Lake Summer Camp.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: George and Harold decide to do an extra credit project on dinosaurs to help their chances of getting summer camp-worthy grades. When Melvin brings in a dinosaur frozen in ice, the boys try to get rid of it. But the ice thaws and they meet Diddlysaurus, a prankster raptor who's huge fans of the boys. He offers to help them with their project if he can pull pranks with them, but when the pranks go too far, the boys and Captain Underpants have to deal with the dino.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po and team arrive in Guatemala and meet farmers who are facing a mysterious threat-- named The Protector, wielding the Storm Wheels. Elsewhere, Colin the Stag Knight and Weimin team up to go after Po and discover Mr. Ping's connection to the widely feared Pirate Queen.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po and team go to the city of Tikal to get more information on the Protector, but it's easier said than done, since nobody in the town actually knows the identity of the Protector. Blade becomes increasingly frustrated and Po attempts to help her.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po and team play a game of Pok-ta-pok against a family of armadillos for the opportunity to talk one on one with Zuma, the leader. The game brings out a highly competitive and aggressive side to Blade, known as "The Beast." Back in China, Colin and Weimin find the Pirate Queen and become part of her pirate crew.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Feline popstar sensation Fluffy Flufferton is performing a concert at the Dollhouse Hotel, and Gabby unboxes tickets to see her! Gabby meets Fluffy and discovers that she’s afraid to try new things because she doesn’t want to make mistakes—why mess with perfection? But with the help of the Gabby Cats, Fluffy learns how to fail fantastically and be the most fluff-tastic version of herself. For our Cat of the Day segment, DJ Catnip sings a song about the Dollhouse Hotel.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a tin full of Cakey-like cupcake kitties, she realizes... Cakey's Cousins are coming to visit! Cakey welcomes his Cousins to the dollhouse and leads them through a fun-filled itinerary of activities, but quickly realizes his cousins have an agenda of their own. For our Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Pillow Cat sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Gabby and Pandy accidentally get turned teeny-tiny when one of Mercat's potions spills. To get back to their normal size, they need to find the right ingredients to make a grow potion, which means going on an itty-bitty search through the dollhouse! For our Cat of the Day segment, Mercat shows us how to make sparkly, mermaid slime.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: When Bootsy's plan of 6 strategically placed kittens brings the whole town down, Mega Fat is forced to team with Boss Baby

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: When Grandma Templeton comes to stay, she forces Boss Baby into Tim's room but they struggle to be roommates, and meanwhile, Baby Corp's new CEO trusts Boss Baby with the new Stinkless Serum

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Convinced old people are the new enemy, Boss Baby uses Tim to create havoc at the senior center, but a war soon begins when the seniors rally against babies

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: After injecting all the teachers with bee DNA, the Melvins run the new "hivemind" of the school. But Ms. Ribble is accidently injected with too much "Bee- NA" and becomes the queen bee, overpowering the Melvins' control. George, Harold and the recently re-hired Vice Principal Krupp must work with the Melvins and stop her from turning everyone into her Zombees.

It's now up to the boys and Captain Underpants to stop the beast before it takes over Piqua with its stench, and more importantly, ruins the boys' chances to go to Lake Summer Camp.

He offers to help them with their project if he can pull pranks with them, but when the pranks go too far, the boys and Captain Underpants have to deal with the dino.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Tony and his crew have been working as spy racers in LA for a while now and are itching to go international. Whey they discover a mysterious man with a strange tattoo of a formula in a smuggling ring bust, Ms. Nowhere finally agrees to let them go to Rio to investigate the tattoo and the whereabouts of one of her agents who has gone dark - Layla Gray.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Ms. Nowhere drops the kids off in Brazil and leaves to go on her own important mission, but things immediately go south for Tony and his crew. When the hauler and gear gets caught in quicksand, Tony needs to learn that a good leader knows when to accept help.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: After losing their mission materials in quicksand, Tony decides to channel Dom and Blend in to get intel from the people of Rio. Unfortunately it's more difficult than he expected, and Tony and his crew are picked up by a group of favela gangsters in a neighborhood that worships a mysterious young female martyr. The crew is relieved to find that Layla is in charge of the gangsters - until she orders the gangsters to dispose of them!

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: George and Harold create a comic book about their gym teacher, but after a freak accident turns fantasy into reality, the best friends must run from his revenge

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: When George and Harold go back in time to stop the invention of homework, they realize they also eliminated the most important thing in the world: comic books

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants

programme.desc: George and Harold transform their new Spanish teacher into a superhero after they feel guilty for pranking him, but their teacher loves it and gets carried away

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: After Erica convinces them that being suspended is a great vacation, George and Harold pull off every prank they can think of in order to get suspended

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws Of Destiny
programme.desc: When Po and the kids stop for the night at an Inn, they meet a gang who wants to fight Po and end up down a path to uncovering Jindiao's evil plan

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: With Morando and his Armada heading for Earth, Aja and Krel clash with Vex and Zadra over how to handle the situation. Vex and Zadra want to alert human authorities, while the Royal teens seek out a more creative solution -- video games.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: The arrival of Tronos – a bounty hunter with the power to control electricity – sparks an investigation by Area 49-B that threatens to expose the Royals’ alien identities. Meanwhile, Mother watches as the Royals struggle to work together to deal with this new threat.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When Colonel Kubritz issues a medical quarantine that locks down the high school, Aja and Krel must avoid capture with help from their friends. Meanwhile Vex, Zadra, and Stuart have a run-in with a familiar face.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: Krogen is on the hunt for dragon lenses and Snotlout and Minden do their best to defend Wing Island. Back in Berk Dagur and Mala feud over keeping the lenses safe

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: After learning that his ancestors once hunted dragons Fishlegs goes out on a journey to find a Dramillion dragon while being faced with the challenge to clear his family name.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: The twins are preparing for their birthday when they are visited by a notoriously mischievous relative administering the Thorston Rite of Passage challenges

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T.
programme.desc: The snails are invited to perform on a cruise ship and while onboard Turbo encounters a group of rodent pirates who challenge him to a race—loser has to walk the plank/When Turbo is knocked out before a big charity race, Skidmark creates a shell that allows the crew to race the unconscious Turbo with a remote control.

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T.
programme.desc: The snails accidentally wake a group of cicadas from their hibernation and after the bugs begin eating the town's food supply the snails go to extreme measures to rid the city of the /A celebrity chef steals Tito's taco recipe and challenges the FAST crew to a relay race against his own group of copycat racing snails.

programme.title: Archibald's Next Big Thing
programme.desc: Archibald's plan to help Sage recover his beloved rocking chair hits a snag. Archibald and his siblings scour the woods for the legendary Crackerfoot.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: While Hoof is about to do his obstacle course, he finds all the fences knocked down. He blames Bling, who was jealous of the lucky wings he wears on his hoofs, but Bling assures she's got nothing to do with it ! Noddy investigates to settle their argument.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: Strange accidents keep happening on the building site. Clockwork Mouse is convinced that someone is trying to stop them finishing the building. Noddy investigates and finds out things aren't quite as they seem...

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: Pat-Pat is doing a magic show but she discovers her magic box is broken. Noddy investigates: Who broke the magic box? He needs to find out soon so that Pat Pat's show can take place.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: Armed with a brand new sat-nav from Fuse, the Pirates head off on The Pirate Challenge, sailing all around Toyland. But when they fail to arrive at their first stop in Toy Green, Noddy investigates what's happened. He must set the Pirates back on course to complete the challenge by the end of the day.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Warthog was really rather handsome. And did he know it! He strutted around Tinga Tinga as if he owned the place. All the animals were fed up with Warthog's boasting, and then one day Lion decided to give chase. Yikes! Warthog ran headfirst into Porcupines burrow! After that, he was no longer the prettiest beast in Tinga Tinga. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Owl's head didn't turn all the way round. She had tiny little eyes and tiny little ears, and she found it very hard to stay awake. Then one day all the Mangoes started disappearing in Tinga Tinga. Against all the animals better judgement, Owl was ordered to watch over the Mango tree … but the mangoes kept disappearing. Desperate to catch the thief, Owl stretched and strained to see who was stealing the precious mangoes, until Ker-Swhing! Her head turned all the way round and she saw who it was… It was the ants! From that day on Owl was made the official night guard of Tinga Tinga. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: Pat's Special Delivery is a very large, very fragile lighthouse bulb, and everything seems to be conspiring to make him break it! Falling timber, an out of control sofa, Bonnie the dog, high winds...! Pat's journey from the sorting office to Pencaster Bay is a minefield of hazards. Waiting for the bulb is lighthouse keeper Chris Beacon and his pet parrot Micawber, both anxious to get the lighthouse working before sundown, and tracking a storm blowing in. Out at sea are Alf and PC Selby, enjoying a day's fishing, until they drift off-course and need the lighthouse to guide them ashore...

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: The Thompson's family pigeon, Cedric, has been reported found in Northern Ireland. Pat must take Dorothy and Bill to help bring him back in the SDS Plane. Meanwhile Alf camps out at the sorting office, pining for his beloved Cedric's return. Once in Ireland, Pat meets the man who found Cedric and Dorothy manages to charm him down from his roof. Unfortunately an inopportune phone call from Alf startles cedric and causes him to take up a roost on a cliff face with a friendly puffin. With Alf causing chaos trying "help" Ben tidy up the Sorting office in Pencaster, Pat exercises his climbing skills to retrieve Cedric but it takes a brave abseil from Dorothy and Sean to finally lure the wayward bird back to its rightful owners.

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Marsha overhears the others saying she is too bossy. She decides that Silver hatch would be a better place without her. Chaos swiftly ensues, can Marsha be persuaded to stay, they can't cope without her!

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Big Chris is working on Loada while the others plan a surprise evening for him for being the longest serving member of Silver hatch

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Big Chris receives a mysterious parcel… the cars are intrigued to find out what is in it. Strange and silly things start happening at the workshop, could it have anything to do with Big Chris' package?

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: PC Pete has been summonsed to get to the bottom of some missing fuel. But where's Nick? And who can solve the case?

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: Queen Sparklewings has done a beautiful painting to use in her Story-Time afternoon. But then Coco and Noddy discover it ruined! Coco thinks that Bling must have done it but she protests her innocence. Noddy investigates: who messed up the Queen's painting - and can he get it fixed again in time? Keep investigating, Noddy!

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: "Deltoid accepts the Ninja's challenge to run around the loop-theloop. But when he fails on his first attempt, he feels ready to give up in despair. Noddy investigates: How can he help Deltoid do his challenge?"

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: The Knights set off on their patrol but are delayed by someone playing tricks on them. Noddy investigates: who's playing tricks on the Knights? He soon finds them in Fable Forest, waylaid by yet another cheeky trick. Noddy will have to find the culprit before the Knights end up in serious trouble!

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: The railway tracks are being repaired all over Toyland by the Builders, so Farmer Tom, Tractor and a trailer are running a replacement service. But the repairs take longer than expected when the Builders' tools go missing. Noddy investigates, and finds that Cloppycorn loved the trailer rides so much that he hid the biolders' tools in a basket that Pat-Pat had asked him to take to the other Naughticorns. Cloppycorn apologies, the tracks are swiftly repaired, and Cloppycorn happily rides around the farm on the trailer. Well done Noddy !

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: The Gabby Cats put their own spin on the classic fairytales "Rapunzel," "The Princess and the Pea," and "Little Red Riding Hood." For the Cat of the Day Segment, CatRat sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It’s Cat-O-Ween in the dollhouse, and all the Gabby Cats are in the holiday spirit. Gabby and Pandy dress up and go trick-or-treating around the dollhouse, where they make cat-o-lanterns with Baby Box, search for hidden treats with MerCat, and make Banana ghosts with Cakey. Along the way, CatRat plays silly tricks on them, but in the end Floyd manages to trick them all! For the Cat of the Day segment, all the Gabby Cats sing a special Cat-O-Ween song.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: Magnus and Axel unveil their new "mechano-dragon." It's impressive at first, but the Riders set out to prove it's no better than a bucket of bolts.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: In need of some rest and relaxation, the Riders head out on vacation. But their supposedly perfect island getaway isn't quite what they hoped for.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When Donna is dog sitting but unable to sleep due to barking, TZG secretly stops a skunk from sneaking into her yard at night and riling the pooch. / When an inexperienced Rona takes over as chairman of the Founder’s Day Celebration, TZG secretly helps ensure the traditional festivities run smoothly.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: When Phoebe convinces the Tooth Fairy to visit before Marcus has actually lost his tooth, the Dew Drops do everything in their power to make sure the tooth is out before she arrives! / The Dews decide to hold a concert in the park for their animal friends, but can’t find the time to practice.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: Queen Sparklewings has done a beautiful painting to use in her Story-Time afternoon. But then Coco and Noddy discover it ruined! programme.title: Cracked
programme.desc: Ruja inherited the painting from her deceased father and hired Tim, an art restorer to repair it, but they don't know that this invaluable art came with invaluable horror.

programme.title: The Protector
programme.desc: Two New York detectives head to Hong Kong after the daughter of a rich businessman is kidnapped by the drug lord

programme.title: Acts of Vengeance
programme.desc: A formerly fast-talking lawyer takes a vow of silence and trains himself to avenge the murder of his family

programme.title: The Master (Jet Li)
programme.desc: A former Chinese Kung Fu master working in L.A. as a medicine man is targeted by an ex-student, and it's up to one of his Hong Kong disciples, who's visiting America, to defend his master's honor.

programme.title: Show Dogs
programme.desc: Max, a macho, solitary Rottweiler police dog is ordered to go undercover as a primped show dog in a prestigious Dog Show, along with his human partner, to avert a disaster from happening.

programme.title: Confidential Assignment 2: International
programme.desc: The film depicts an unpredictable global cooperative investigation by South Korean, North Korean, and American detectives who have come together for their own purposes.

programme.title: The Veil
programme.desc: Wounded warrior dude comes across a minuscule tribe in hiding. War is upon them so they must go out and find it.

programme.title: Hellboy: Rise of the Blood Queen
programme.desc: Hellboy, a supernatural being, protects the earth with the Bureau of Paranormal Research and Defense. Soon, he faces the blood queen, an ancient witch who wants to bring about the end of the world

programme.title: The Golden Holiday
programme.desc: Byeong-Soo works as a detective in the countryside and takes his family on a trip to the Philippines. He becomes involved in a crime planned by Patric, becoming a murder suspect.

programme.title: Made on the Rooftop
programme.desc: High tension summer romance of cool and hip best of friends, HaNeul and Bong-sik, their relationship struggles and personal secrets .

programme.title: A Score to Settle
programme.desc: An ex-enforcer for a local crime syndicate has vowed to enact retribution on his mob bosses after 19 years of wrongful imprisonment.

programme.title: New Fist of Fury
programme.desc: A fighter helps a woman protect her martial-arts school in World War II Taiwan.

programme.title: The Oath
programme.desc: 400 A.D., in a forgotten time of Ancient America, a lone Hebraic fugitive must preserve the history of his fallen nation while being hunted by a ruthless tyrant. But rescuing the King's abused mistress could awaken a warrior's past.

programme.title: The World This Week - Episode 14
programme.desc: Girish Sawlani brings you a weekly roundup of international news from an Australian perspective as reported by ABC News correspondents covering the Indo Pacific, Europe, North America, the Middle East, India and Indonesia.

programme.title: Compass - Reclaiming Pride
programme.desc: A former Pentecostal preacher, Anthony Venn-Brown struggled with his sexuality as a young man. His coming out and subsequent religious activism has helped reform laws banning gay conversion therapy.

programme.title: If You're Listening - Black Swans - Black Swans (Part 4) Countdown To Doomsday
programme.desc: During the Cold War, it was a very real fear that a nuclear winter would obliterate life as we know it. In 2026 the sense of dread has been replaced by the threat of climate change. So are we destined to feel doomed? (Part 4)

programme.title: Spies In The Outback - The Spy Who Loved Alice
programme.desc: The Cold War has finally ended but Pine Gap is expanding and it's getting involved in conflicts across the world. We hear from someone who's been on the inside, meeting a spy who's spent years working within the razor wire.

programme.title: Dr Karl's How Things Work - Boots
programme.desc: Dr Karl gets a real kick out of discovering how leather boots are made at a factory in South Australia. From first cut to final polish, making a boot from a single piece of leather requires over 80 individual processes.

programme.title: AFL Premiership Season - Round 7 - Brisbane Lions v Adelaide Crows
programme.desc: ABC Australia brings you Australian Rules football live in your lounge room every week with coverage of the 2026 AFL Premiership Season.

programme.title: Island Echoes with Nornie Bero - Episode 4
programme.desc: Join acclaimed Torres Strait Islander chef and cultural ambassador Nornie Bero in Island Echoes, a vibrant journey through the breathtaking landscapes and rich traditions of her homeland.

programme.title: On Country Kitchen - Episode 9
programme.desc: It's season 2 and Derek still can't cook! With locally found ingredients, and a sprinkle of culture and character, Mark and Derek create an Indigenous-inspired feast for the people they visit along their journey.

programme.desc: There's never been a more important time for transparency and trust. ABC News brings you the day's top stories and latest news, with more reporters to tell you what's going on and why it matters. Presented by Joe O'Brien.

programme.title: Compass - Reclaiming Pride
programme.desc: A former Pentecostal preacher, Anthony Venn-Brown struggled with his sexuality as a young man. His coming out and subsequent religious activism has helped reform laws banning gay conversion therapy.

programme.title: World’s Wildest Weather: Caught On Camera - EP 10

The film uses jaw dropping, often never-before-seen footage, captured on cameras and phones.

programme.title: Films & Stars 2026/27 - EP 3

programme.title: Animal Impossible - EP 7
programme.desc: Tim Warwood and Adam Gendle risk life and limb to uncover the truth about animals in this eye-opening and entertaining series. Do cats always land on their feet? Could a squid sink a ship? Is spider silk really stronger than steel? The intrepid pair quiz experts and conduct audacious stunts - including a nerve-wracking swim with a great white shark - to get answers. But they find more than they expected, discovering a whole host of strange and remarkable truths about the animal kingdom.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off S8 - EP 2
programme.desc: The junior version of this global phenomenon returns, hosted by BAFTA-winning comedian Harry Hill. Pastry chef and food writer Ravneet Gill and Bake Off alumnus Liam Charles return to judge the efforts of more budding bakers. It's a mouth-watering journey, as 16 of the country's best young bakers compete. A joyful way of getting children passionate about food.

programme.title: Croc Watch and Hippo Watch with Steve Backshall - EP 1
programme.desc: With his trademark adventure-style approach, Steve takes us to South Africa’s Ndumo Game Reserve to explore the dangerous world of hippos and crocs. Remarkable moments include the tagging of a formidable three-meter-long crocodile the unique dietary habits of hippos (and how they cause conflict with local farmers) and how vulnerable these creatures are to climate change.

programme.title: Lingo UK S2 - EP 9
programme.desc: In this game show, hosted by the iconic RuPaul, the simplest of words could be worth thousands of dollars. Teams are pitted against each other in a battle to fill in the blanks and find words.

Jia Hong is heartbroken, and he takes his anger out on Shu Juan, as he is unhappy that she has broken them up.

programme.title: Dear Neighbours - EP 20 我的左邻右里
programme.desc: Xi Yue sleeps with Yu Jie after getting drunk. Feeling regretful, she quickly goes back home. Yan Xun apologises to Xi Yue that he is unable to celebrate their wedding anniversary. He gives her a gift, and informs her that he will be going overseas to work. Xi Yue becomes emotional. Yan Xun finds out that Xi Yue has an affair, and is taken aback by the news. Xi Yue is unable to face Yan Xun, so she leaves the house. Yan Xun confronts Yu Jie aggressively, and demands Yu Jie to leave the house.

programme.title: My Fair Lady - EP 13 我爱钟无艳

Among the many talented individuals of that era, she stands out from the crowd, due in no small part to her knowledge of warfare, weapons and magic. Her gifts bring her to the attention of Emperor Qi, who takes her as his bride in order to help him manage the kingdom.

Its space-saving design makes it ideal for convenient home cardio sessions. I-Running X-Fold折叠运动脚踏车，设计时尚小巧，配有舒适座垫、可调阻力和LCD显示屏，支持手机App连接，适合家庭健身使用。其折叠设计节省空间便于收纳，帮助您在家轻松进行有氧运动，保持体能、身形和肌肉量。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - La Gourmet Food Steamer
programme.desc: Simplify meal prep with the 2-Tier Stainless Steel Electric Multi Food Steamer. Designed for healthy, fast, and versatile cooking, it allows you to steam veggies, fish, and more simultaneously, preserving nutrients and flavor. Compact and easy to use—perfect for a nutritious lifestyle! 使用双层不锈钢电动多功能蒸锅，轻松做出健康美味的菜肴。专为健康、快捷、灵活的烹饪设计，能同时蒸煮蔬菜、鱼类等食材，最大限度保留营养与原味。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Dontz Mini Massage Gun
programme.desc: Say goodbye to muscle tension, fatigue, and soreness – this mini powerhouse delivers a therapeutic experience with targeted relief. 迷你筋膜枪小巧精悍，捶打式冲击力十足直达肌肉深层！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Wiltshire Pink Board Bundle
programme.desc: All-in-one knife, scissors and board bundle that makes your life easier with an in-built knife sharpener! 全套组合菜刀、剪刀、砧板，让你下厨更轻松！菜刀和剪刀附专业磨刀套！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Omron Knee TENS
programme.desc: The OMRON Knee TENS is a drug-free, non-invasive device designed to relieve knee pain and stiffness using clinically proven TENS technology. Compact and easy to use, it delivers gentle electrical pulses that stimulate nerves and improve blood circulation, helping to reduce pain from arthritis, injury, or overuse. With customizable intensity levels and ideal for daily use at home or on the go. OMRON 膝盖电疗仪是一款非药物、非侵入式的膝部护理设备，采用微电流技术TENS，有效缓解膝盖疼痛与僵硬感。产品轻巧易用，通过温和电脉冲刺激神经、促进血液循环，帮助缓解因关节炎、运动伤害或过度使用引起的不适。多段强度可调，贴合膝盖设计，提供精准、舒适的护理体验。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Ellixi Hair Tonic
programme.desc: Revitalize your hair with Ellixi Hair Tonic — your ultimate solution for stronger, healthier, and more vibrant locks. Infused with a powerful blend of natural botanical extracts, essential oils, and vital nutrients, Ellixi helps to promote growth, and helps reduce hair fall. Whether you're battling thinning, dryness, or dullness, this lightweight tonic nourishes the scalp and restores shine without leaving any residue. 护发要趁早！Ellixi打造更健康、更亮丽秀发。Ellixi 纯天然植物萃取、含精油和有助于护发的重要营养素，有助于促进头发生长，减少脱发。无论您是头发稀疏、干燥问题，或是希望保持浓密秀发，Ellixi都能帮助你滋养头皮，恢复秀发光泽，且不留任何残留。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Tupperware Freezable 5-Container Set
programme.desc: The Tupperware Freezable 5-Container Set makes meal prep and long-term storage easy, locking in freshness and flavour. Tupperware's No. 1 freezing containers feature a speedy-freeze design and flexible material for easy unmolding. Available in multiple sizes, there's a perfect container for every freezer storage need. Tupperware 冷冻保鲜 5 件套让备餐和长期储存变得便捷，有效锁住食物的新鲜度。作为 Tupperware 畅销第一的冷冻容器，它采用快速冷冻设计与柔韧材质，冷冻后轻松脱模。多种尺寸组合，能轻松满足各种冷冻储存的需求。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Panasonic EH-NA9M
programme.desc: Combat dryness and elevate your hair care with Panasonic EH-NA9M. Its nanoe™ and Mineral Ion technology infuse moisture deep into strands and scalp, promoting smoother, healthier hair. With Skin Care mode, it even hydrates your skin—your all-in-one beauty tool for effortless styling and daily nourishment. Panasonic EH-NA9M 吹风机采用独家 nanoe™ 奈米水离子与矿物负离子技术，有效滋润发丝与头皮，告别毛躁，打造柔顺亮泽秀发。Skin Care 模式还能为肌肤补水，一机多用，轻松在家享受沙龙级护理体验
